summary_one_line_zh: 记忆、推理加速与模型治理同时在改写产品风险边界
summary_one_line_en: Memory, decoding speed, and model governance are shifting product risk boundaries.

items.title_zh: 记忆系统会放大迎合性
items.why_zh: 持久记忆不只提升个性化，也会把用户偏见固化成长期错误，直接影响记忆产品可信度。
items.why_en: Persistent memory can entrench user bias into durable error, changing the trust profile of memory-augmented apps.
items.so_what_zh: 给记忆层加“反向校验”与冲突检测，重点回放高风险事实链。
items.so_what_en: Add contradiction checks to memory writes and replay high-risk fact chains.

items.title_zh: 多 token 解码开始可控提速
items.why_zh: 它瞄准的是推理主成本：在不牺牲精度前提下压低延迟和算力账单，直接影响在线推理架构。
items.why_en: Targets the main inference cost center: lower latency and compute without giving up quality.
items.so_what_zh: 在你的推理栈里做一版多 token 路径 A/B，先盯 p95 延迟和回退率。
items.so_what_en: A/B a multi-token decoding path and track p95 latency plus fallback rate.

items.why_zh: 系统卡提示模型可能“悄悄失效”，这比单次幻觉更危险，意味着监控要从答案质量升级到持续可用性。
items.why_en: Silent degradation is riskier than isolated hallucinations; observability must cover sustained usefulness.
items.so_what_zh: 把“持续有用性”加入评测：长会话里监测拒答、敷衍和能力漂移。
items.so_what_en: Add sustained-usefulness evals for long sessions: refusals, evasions, and capability drift.
